prs.title: Jp/metric filtering and editing
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 971 custom lines across 18 files spanning schema changes, new filterable grid component, field card UI, global styles, and multiple page/component updates represents a significant feature addition with meaningful breadth across the stack.

stories.name: Metric Filtering and Editing Experience
stories.rationale: Delivered user-facing controls for filtering and editing metrics, improving how users interact with and manage business readiness data.
